title: Embed Slack user groups IDs in Tags

posts.author: _DK (d)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

With our team, we are looking for a solution to our issue with Slack group IDs:

We are currently using Slack integration in order to ping specific slack groups. The IDs are fetched in a Text column on the board such as: <!subteam^SSKTRBFM1|team1>,<!subteam^S60SH6DA7|team2>…

It would be useful to have slack group IDs embedded in rollover menu Tags.
This way, we would avoid making users copy/paste these IDs each time they want to ping a Slack group.

We didn’t find a solution in order to ease this yet.
Thanks in advance.
